chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 1/8: Browse and Compare
scene: 你想买一双跑鞋，跟朋友讨论选哪款。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Which pair? How are the reviews?

turns.cn: 这款四星半，但有人说偏小半码。
turns.en: This one's four and a half stars, but some say it runs small.

turns.cn: 那你买大半码，免费退货就行。
turns.en: Size up half. Free returns, right?
Yes. Free returns within thirty days.
Black goes with everything. Go for it.
Okay. Checking out now.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 2/8: Checkout Questions
scene: 结账时在线客服弹出，你问配送时间。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Need help?

turns.cn: 这双鞋几天能到？运费多少？
turns.en: How many days for these shoes? What's shipping?

turns.cn: Prime 会员两天到，免运费。
turns.en: Prime members get it in two days. Free shipping.
Can you deliver to the side entrance?
Add it in delivery notes at checkout.
Okay. Thanks.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 3/8: Track the Package
scene: 第二天，快递显示「派送中」，室友问你到了没。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Your shoes arrive today, right?

turns.cn: App 显示下午三点到六点之间。
turns.en: App says between three and six PM.
I won't be home. Can you get it?
Sure. I'll text you a photo when it arrives.
Snap a photo if they leave it at the door.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 4/8: Package Arrives
scene: 下午四点，快递员把包裹放在门口。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Amazon package. Left it at the door.
Thanks. I see it.
Have a good one!
You too.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 5/8: Wrong Size
scene: 你试穿后发现确实偏小，决定退货。（对话链：网购）

turns.cn: 果然偏小，脚趾顶前面了。
turns.en: Yep, too small. My toes hit the front.
Exchange for half a size up?
Return first, then reorder. Exchange is slower.
You still have the box?

turns.cn: 在，我 App 里申请退货。
turns.en: Yes. I'll start the return in the app.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 6/8: Start Return Online
scene: 你打客服电话确认退货流程。（对话链：网购）

turns.cn: 在线客服，请问什么问题？
turns.en: Online support. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 鞋偏小，要退货，二维码已生成。
turns.en: Shoes run small. I want to return them. QR code is ready.

turns.cn: 可以去 UPS 或 Kohl's 退货点。
turns.en: You can drop off at UPS or Kohl's.
Do I pay return shipping?
No, the seller prepaid it.
How long for the refund?

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 7/8: Drop Off Return
scene: 你去 UPS 门店退包裹。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Hi, can I help you?

turns.cn: 我要退这个亚马逊包裹。
turns.en: I need to return this Amazon package.
Please show me the return QR code.
Here it is. The size doesn't fit.

turns.cn: 好了，退款三到五个工作日到账。
turns.en: All set. Your refund will arrive in three to five business days.
Thank you.

chain.title: Online Shopping End to End
chain.titleCn: 对话链：网购从下单到售后

title: Chain 8/8: Reorder Correct Size
scene: 退款处理中，你重新下单大半码。（对话链：网购）

turns.en: Did you reorder?
Half size up. Arrives in two days.
Should fit this time.

turns.cn: 希望如此，退货流程还挺顺的。
turns.en: Hope so. Return process was smooth.
Try them on and show me.
Will do.
